description: Bright Minds Biosciences Inc., a biotechnology company, develops therapeutics to improve the lives of patients with severe and life-altering diseases in the United States. Its portfolio includes 5-HT2 Receptors, which are serotonin agonists for epilepsy and neuropsychiatric disorders; and BMB-101, which has completed phase 1 trial for undisclosed seizure disorder and is in phase 2 clinical trials for the developmental and epileptic encephalopathies and absence epilepsies. The company also develops BMB-201 and BMB-202 for the treatment of neuropsychiatric and neurology indications; and BMB-105,
